description: Chain risk scenario: memory issue, swap issue, and disk issue are adjacent in embedding space but have different root causes. Should form 3 separate clusters (singletons), NOT be chained into one.

alerts.text: Application memory usage at 94%. Java heap space exhausted. OutOfMemoryError thrown. JVM GC overhead limit exceeded. Heap dump triggered.
Swap space 91% consumed. System thrashing. CPU iowait 78%. Processes sleeping on disk I/O waiting for swap pages. Performance severely degraded.
Disk I/O saturation: disk_read_mbps 312, disk_write_mbps 287. Storage array latency 840ms. Volume throughput limit reached. Writes queuing.
